The '''Law Elders''' were the ruling planetary council of [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]], the capital planet of the [[Halla sector/Legends|Halla sector]]. Made up of members of both the [[Bimm/Legends|Near-Human]] and [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|furred races]] of Bimm, the council met in the [[Tower of Law]]. While aligned with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Law Elder|Elders]] opened negotiations to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the early days of the [[Thrawn campaign]]. After negotiations with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], Bimmisaari ultimately chose to join the New Republic, and other worlds in the Halla sector such as [[Danuta]] followed suit.
